friend, Last year on Cyber Monday, Jeff Bezos’s wealth grew by $6.28 billion. It would take a family saving $100,000 a year for nearly _63,000 years_ to save what Bezos made in those 24 hours — and many American families struggle to save anything at all. Tom believes a system that creates this much inequality is broken and immoral. [_**That’s why America needs a wealth tax — add your name if you agree.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWAZ4dH51JRK2EJGYjHYfCEyf2w80DyBr1wvUDw7mLHynr58y-2Fc4A-2FHBV0v4HdYX6lAtR1SbCIcMvCHQnMJVJkf8g1qVJrG1pJ6ePtfy1iDgIS32lOMW88vqO8RxwHHnG4ccOhTsFe4T99MjpOviFzh7aQeAOfu-2BaNTUsa4thKT1-2F4Ea8286Z6L2vqV3vV1xRI-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFcgMwogVGX6zo-2Fpl5422mLEAsTMXYnoiuTReWPBwNSm-2FwzQa-2FsovoePEvfRWkN0yUqxnaBFCtcnRsGSLC58iAeMe-2BwDL6lIX1-2FrrclT-2FcbcRNFLQcO43y-2FjjJcYe-2BTr-2FQ7PWSQ30OoJGQCOsM3D20Bo7HDBCkb6Qn6lHF-2F3uD8xMsagcOK94stDq4-2FHFngGDYt3-2FllzoRIPjAX9AB65jbE3KUoq8nXQ4jY4h02XD0fhtjj9qT22tvZQQ3fb4A6ZLQ3m1SYA0Pvmh0d23W68-2FY62Q0feD57wZ0P6EXxVgBBLjeJFeXErdMnXOMYQhU2m8ybWRvfRz97QgJ5AZAqihbvWzBnYBxeEcF8sEQl3jLEPGbhB73AKQD8ABGgbDM-2Bwj-2BA-3D) Our economic system prioritizes helping big corporations and the wealthiest among us. The Trump administration gives tax breaks to CEOs like Bezos while putting more debt and worry on American families every day. Economic security should be available to all of us — and the responsibility for keeping our economy strong shouldn’t rest on already struggling families. Tom knows that responsibility rests on people like him, who have seen great success in this system, and on our elected leaders. That’s why he’s been calling for a wealth tax for over a year. name: Cory Booker
subject: I can't believe it's December
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| It's already December, friend -- I'm not sure how that's possible, but my phone is usually right about these things. Like I told the team around here, I hope you got some downtime to rest up and recharge. **Because from here, it 's an all-out sprint.** **The Iowa caucuses are now just two months away.** And we have less than two weeks to qualify for the critical December debate. So I wanted to send you a note tonight before we all get back to work and back to the everyday grind. I'm optimistic, but no matter what polls show in the days and weeks ahead, I can't express how grateful I am for each and every person who has gotten us where we are today. The odds are stacked against us, as they have been from the start. **But I believe in us. I 'm so proud of what we've done so far. And I know that, with a little elbow grease, we can earn a spot on that debate stage.** To meet the DNC's polling threshold, our team is going all out to make sure voters hear from us directly in the days ahead. **[Every dollar helps reach more people and gets us one step closer to that stage -- chip in what you can right now and let's give this everything we've got.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191201_CB_20191201-fr-CB-December-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191201_CB_20191201-fr-CB-December-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Michael (personal)
subject: grateful for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, I wanted to take a moment to share my gratitude for this team. Your individual contributions helped us to not just meet but exceed our fundraising goals.

So thank you for everything you continue to do. We couldn't do this without you.

**The outpouring of support we 've received from friends like you since I announced my campaign for president has been nothing short of remarkable. Time and again, you've come through.**

I know we send a lot of emails, but your donations are sustaining our grassroots campaign as we take our message of driving opportunity for every American and building a broad coalition for change to communities across the country.

**It 's not lost on me that some people considered this campaign a long shot, but the power of our grassroots team continues to dispel their doubts, and I'm grateful to have you in my corner, friend.**

Thank you for your continuing support.

Michael
---

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Donate for a signed copy of my book – limited supply!
body:
Carly Fiorina

This holiday season, I'm proud to be supporting Unlocking
Potential, a non-profit that is committed to building citizen
leaders solving problems right in front of them.

Friends,

In my book, Find Your Way, I talk about how
important it is to invest in the people closest to the problem.
They always know and understand the problem best.

This holiday season, I'm proud to be supporting
Unlocking Potential, a non-profit that is committed to building
citizen leaders solving problems right in front of them. UP
invests in the heroes who serve our veterans, students, and the
disabled every day-and who don't get a chance to focus on their
own development. Will you join me?

For a limited time, if you donate $75.00, you'll
receive a copy of Find Your Way, signed by me. Will you consider
making a contribution?

Your gift means so much to me. I hope you will
continue to support me in my efforts of building leaders and
problem-solvers. If you cannot make a gift today, consider
joining our volunteer Network and donating your time in the
coming year.

Together we can unlock potential in our
communities.

Sincerely,

Carly Fiorina

Chairman, Unlocking Potential Foundation

Hey there! You joined us on March 22, 2019.

Want to Unsubscribe? No problem. We understand.

----Powered by Paramount Communication----
http://www.paramountcommunication.com

name: Kathy Manning
subject: I wanted you to be the first to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
I am running for Congress. Will you join our team?
|
---

| | I know, it's been a little while since you last heard from me but I wanted you to be among the first to know. In October, a North Carolina court ruled that our congressional districts are partisanly gerrymandered and they ordered the General Assembly to redraw the congressional district maps for the 2020 elections. New maps were released three weeks ago and the Triad is now located in the newly drawn Sixth District, a Democratic leaning district that includes all of Guilford County and parts of Forsyth County. We fought hard under heavily gerrymandered maps in 2018 because I believed it was important for North Carolinians to have a choice and leaders who will stand up for their interests -- even when the odds are against them. I am proud of the work we did in 2018. Since the new congressional maps were recently announced, I've heard from folks all across the Triad and I'm thankful for the outpouring of support and encouragement to jump back into the race. I'm excited to share -- **I 'm running for North Carolina's newly drawn Sixth Congressional District! ** North Carolinians continue to need a leader who will put people before politics. They need a representative who will stand up for our values and beliefs. [_**That 's exactly what I'm in this race to do. If you're ready to make Washington work for North Carolina, join our team today.**_](https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/m/18d9d3dd/3d199a51/2f2a7819/7364e479/2131699249/VEsH/?g= "https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/s/launch") This fight is deeply personal for me. In 2018, we traveled thousands of miles across North Carolina listening to stories of our neighbors across this community. They want better paying jobs, affordable health care and prescription drugs, and an economy that works for all North Carolinians -- not just those at the top. **I 'm in this race to expand affordable health care, invest in quality education, and strengthen our economy. And with over 30 years of experience bringing people together to solve tough problems in our community, I believe we can make it happen.** [_**Join Team Kathy today >>**_](https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/m/18d9d3dd/3d199a51/2f2a7819/7364e479/2131699249/VEsE/?g= "https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/s/launch") Frankly, this race isn't about me. It's about you. In 2018 -- with your help -- we ran one of the largest Democratic congressional campaigns in North Carolina's history. Our grassroots campaign knocked on thousands of doors, made phone calls, and talked to neighbors from across this community about our shared vision for a better North Carolina. **Join us to build on that foundation in 2020.** Just like last time, this campaign is going to be driven by hardworking folks who want to see a change in our communities and in our government. [_**So I need to ask: Will you join our team and fight for change in North Carolina?**_](https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/m/18d9d3dd/3d199a51/2f2a7819/7364e479/2131699249/VEsF/?g= "https://kathymanning.bsd.net/page/s/launch") Let's do this. With gratitude, Kathy |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

And with over 30 years of experience bringing people together to solve tough problems in our community, I believe we can make it happen. = "" Frankly, this race isn't about me. It's about you. In 2018 -- with your help -- we ran one of the largest Democratic congressional campaigns in North Carolina's history. Our grassroots campaign knocked on thousands of doors, made phone calls, and talked to neighbors from across this community about our shared vision for a better North Carolina. Join us to build on that foundation in 2020. Just like last time, this campaign is going to be driven by hardworking folks who want to see a change in our communities and in our government. = "" Let's do this. With gratitude, Kathy | | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please = ""

subject: Just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I am grateful for each and every one of you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12450652/128129190/480453248?refcode=em_ty_2019.12.02_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGFhYTliYS0zNTE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2CkPULm3doqDfMhVSzF_f-fJgKnwVnL_WHf0euSO3k=) Team,

**I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you for helping us reach our November fundraising goal!** We have such an amazing network of supporters, and I am grateful for each and every one of you.

This race is more competitive than ever, and the country will be watching to see what happens right here in central Pennsylvania. Special interest groups have already shown that they’re willing to spend millions of dollars to maintain the status quo in districts just like this. **But they’re no match for the incredible grassroots, people-powered campaign we’ve built here.**

Thank you for being on this team. I know that, together, we will flip PA-10 blue.

Eugene

| Hoosier Republican -

Here at your Indiana Republican Party, we're joining in on the **Cyber Monday** deals and [extending our Early Bird rate for Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8bac700493&e=1acd9bb3d6) through the end of the week!

If you [register NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eee6138016&e=1acd9bb3d6) for this two-day training event, you'll get access to the discounted rate of just $75 per person. But this is your **last chance** before the Early Bird rate disappears. Starting next week, General Admission registration will be available for $100 per person.
[\--> Register Now at the Early Bird Rate for Cyber Monday! <\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2f70c86ca6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Congress of Counties is an important event to ensure Indiana stays on the right track. You'll hear from our top Indiana Republican elected officials, and participate in breakout sessions on:
* Candidate recruitment
* Fundraising
* Social media
* Technology training, and more!

[Register now and save](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b6c0e501f&e=1acd9bb3d6)! See you in 2020!

Thanks!
-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

name: Mike Siegel
subject: The story of Rosa Parks continues to inspire.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12452121/128145364/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJkOGViOS0zYjE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5Xg3MGxal9SUZRbUyH7lS4Hu03vrERYJyzK1QYQGOc=&emci=94bd8eb9-3b15-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=95bd8eb9-3b15-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **The story of Rosa Parks continues to inspire.** Her role in catalyzing the Montgomery Bus Boycott, through her arrest on December 1, 1955, is the stuff of legends. How a Black woman took on racist Jim Crow laws, and won! Not as well known, however, is how Rosa Parks’ refusal to go to the back of the bus was not a single act of defiance, but the result of a history of struggle and organizing. As one author noted: _“Parks' defiance of Montgomery's segregation laws was not an isolated incident. It was part of a lifelong crusade to dismantle Jim Crow. She was a veteran activist and part of a local movement whose leaders had been waiting for the right moment to launch a campaign against bus segregation.”_ **Our work today, in 2019, builds on the work of past generations, including the heroes of the Civil Rights Movement. Voting rights laws, public housing, Medicare and more — these were won by powerful movements in the 1960s, which themselves built upon generations of organizing.** Today, we continue these struggles: to fight voter suppression, to house the homeless, to extend healthcare to every American, to ensure justice and opportunity for all. The Republican Party knows how important the Civil Rights Movement was — they’ve been working to undo those achievements for the last fifty years. It’s our job to keep fighting, and to make room for the next generation of leaders, like Ms. Rosa Parks. We never know when our actions will result in lasting changes. But by continuing to do the work, we lay the foundation for social progress. As historian Peter Dreier wrote: _“Many ideas that were once considered outrageous, utopian and impractical are today taken for granted. The radical ideas of one generation often become the common sense of subsequent generations. That only happens when people like Rosa Parks — a movement activist — join forces for the long haul.”_ **Let’s keep doing this work! And give thanks to all who cleared the path we walk today.** In solidarity,
Mike Siegel
* * *

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's attacks on immigrants are slipping under the radar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment inquiry. Just recently, he promoted Chad Wolf, architect of the family separation policy, to be the top Homeland Security undersecretary. Since Trump can't be bothered with asking for congressional approval for actual cabinet positions anymore, Wolf is now the de facto DHS chief. And his heinous policy is still in place, no matter how well the administration's tried to bury it and change it. Even though lower courts have ruled consistently against his illegal decision to end DACA and set up DREAMers for deportation, the president took his appeal to the Supreme Court last month. Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. We need to know where voters stand on this critical issue: **Do you support DACA?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc97/6e9863e8/16c68186/1db0a3ac/1336111657/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6q-ZwjrW") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc97/6e9863e8/16c68186/1db0a3ac/1336111657/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6q-ZwjrW") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc97/6e9863e8/16c68186/1db0a3b3/1336111657/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191202a.ND&refcode2=gn7fWbgU0fTzs812susT")
---
|
---

---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

name: Latinos for Trump
subject: Latinos for Trump served 500 Border Patrol Agents before Thanksgiving. Thanks to YOU!
body:
Hello, Patriots! El Paso Border Patrol Appreciation Patriots we traveled to El Paso this last week to feed our Border Patrol agents and had a succes
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=177808.1567.1.6cbf1437e2fa9c45727d6d53a7bd7556) |
---
# Hello, Patriots!
---
|
---
# El Paso Border Patrol Appreciation
Patriots we traveled to El Paso this last week to feed our Border Patrol agents and had a successful event! Volunteers came from all over Texas to help. We covered 10 stations across a 5 hour radius and delivered 500 plates to our men and women in green protecting our border!
|
---
# Thank YOU!
Thank you to ALL those patriots that contributed and helped make this possible. We could not have done this without Anthony Aguero, Sandra Whitten, Dr. Alma Arredondo Lynch, Raul Reyes, Yvonne Clouser, Walter West, Maria Miller Salinas, Bianca Gracia, and Jen Loh. These are just a few of the many other volunteers!
|
---
# A Special Thank You
We would like to THANK Jaqueline Torres for her effortless limitless volunteer hours and dedication in helping us make this event successful. We could not have done it without YOU!
|
---
## WE served and delivered 500 plates!
---
| |
---
---
|
---
| | [ DONATE NOW ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=177808.1568.1.58556971d5df1a6af461a6204baf77f7)
---
Consider donating to our organization so that WE can continue to travel and spread cheer and joy across the country in defending Faith, Family, and our Freedom!

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Surprises Troops in Afghanistan on Thanksgiving
body:
"He visited Bagram Air Base on Thursday, delivering Thanksgiving greetings to U.S. troops deployed there in America’s longest-running war." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d063b0ee12&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Surprises Troops in Afghanistan on Thanksgiving**

“President Trump surprised American troops in Afghanistan on Thanksgiving after leaving his Florida residence overnight,” Mike Brest reports for the _Washington Examiner_. “He visited Bagram Air Base on Thursday, delivering Thanksgiving greetings to U.S. troops deployed there in America’s longest-running war. This is Trump’s second visit to a combat zone. He previously visited troops in Iraq the day after Christmas in 2018.”

During his address to the troops, the President announced renewed peace talks between America and the Taliban, saying the Taliban wants “to make a deal.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cbf528c6c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “House Speaker Nancy Pelosi says Democrats are trying to remove President Trump from office ‘prayerfully,’ and ‘sadly,’ and ‘with a heavy heart.’ In fact, as anyone who has been watching knows, many Democrats have been itching to impeach Trump since the day he took office,” Byron York writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=549973ed16&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| For the first time in at least 70 years, the United States posted a full month as a net petroleum exporter. “The U.S. solidified its status as an energy producer by posting the first full month as a net exporter of crude and petroleum products since government records began in 1949,” Stephen Cunningham writes for [_Bloomberg_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f401b970e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump said he and First Lady Melania Trump are mourning the ‘lives lost’ on World AIDS Day and reiterated his commitment that the scourge would be eliminated in a decade,” Mark Moore reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5fc5b6ce12&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=017ac7f103&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1ace56712&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fe7bf82af2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Add your name to say you personally endorse Sara Gideon for U.S. Senate and you're willing to fight hard to defeat Susan Collins.
body:
Here's the truth...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff864/3963217600/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
The only way we win this election and defeat Susan Collins is with all of us working together.
Because here's the truth: There are many special interest groups and corporate PACs who want nothing more than to defeat us.
They want to maintain the status quo and preserve a system where one bad accident or diagnosis can send a family spiraling into bankruptcy.
**But we CAN defeat them -- and that starts with you saying you're willing to fight. So will you?**
[**Add your name to personally endorse Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate and say you're willing to fight _hard_ to defeat Susan Collins. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff87b/3963217600/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191202-2-a")
Just remember, there are more of us than there are of them. If we come together to create the kind of grassroots movement I know we are capable of, nothing can stop us.
So please, add your name to say you endorse our people-powered campaign:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Endorsement](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff87b/3963217600/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191202-2-a")**
Thank you for signing your name and being a part of this team. I mean it when I say, we can't do this without you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff87b/3963217600/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItMi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191202-2-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff87a/3963217600/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f86/4bef7a87/6b80f836/287ff879/3963217600/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f4/3eb3e2fc/681509ab/744d23b8/2821523166/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f4/3eb3e2fc/681509ab/744d23a7/2821523166/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f4/3eb3e2fc/681509ab/744d23a6/2821523166/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Endorsement Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
Hi Friends,

Today we are proud to announce that State Senator Anthony Williams (8th District), State Rep. Joanna McClinton (191st Legislative District), State Rep. Jordan Harris (186th Legislative District), and Councilmember Kenyatta Johnson (2nd District) have endorsed Nina to be the next Auditor General of Pennsylvania.

"On behalf of State Reps Joanna McClinton and Jordan Harris,Councilman Kenyatta Johnson, and myself, we are unequivocally pleased to endorse Nina Ahmad for Pennsylvania Auditor General," said State Senator Anthony H. Williams. "She is, without a doubt, the best person for the job. Her life and career experience will make her an effective watchdog of the state's finances, and also a powerful advocate for progressive change in our state."

Nina is running for auditor general for two simple reasons: To increase transparency and accountability in Pennsylvania. We deserve to know what our state government is doing and who is doing it. And when the system fails, someone needs to be held accountable.

If elected, Ahmad would be the first immigrant and the first woman of color elected statewide in Pennsylvania. She would also be the only woman statewide office holder.

"To have earned the support of this powerful coalition of elected leaders in Philadelphia is both an honor and a call to action," said Ahmad. "I'm proud to have their support, but now we have to put in the hard work to win this primary and deliver on the promise of our campaign. I'm looking forward to working with the Southwest Coalition to make the Office of the Auditor General a tool for accountability and progressive change."

Join our team at [www.ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/0qGKiwm3xnR3S_IeEY3JoLGjaNdprsMkkjlgc_HJGOQ=/yFE5WWBcOtBSzyE1wE5zpAWmkhOrJ9skJzki7Ot-G_w=) and donate [HERE](https://act.myngp.com/el/0qGKiwm3xnR3S_IeEY3JoLGjaNdprsMkkjlgc_HJGOQ=/lO_ElD9AfFZbLDPZ9mdbS1aPvKpIrhTjTrNYvv_jLmU=) or makes checks payable to Nina For PA and send to PO Box 40681 Philadelphia, Pa 19107

Paid for by Nina for PA

Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

name: Charles Booker
subject: Mitch McConnell takes corporate PAC money. Here’s why I never will.
body:
|
---
Folks, Mitch McConnell answers to corporations. I only answer to real Kentuckians. My priority is you. For too long, big money has corrupted and distorted our politics. That’s why our movement is so important. **We’re going to show greedy corporations that Kentucky is not for sale.** I won’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs. **That means this movement depends on grassroots supporters like you donating in response to emails like this.** As I start my listening tour across the Commonwealth this week, I’ll need your help to get it going. [_**My team told me we need to raise $100,000 by the end of the month. Will you chip in $10 or more to fund our people-powered movement to defeat Mitch?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457299/128197154/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191202_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457300/128197155/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191202-AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=)

The thing about corporate PACs is that they don’t just give folks money and leave them alone. These corporations are buying politicians to serve their interests in office and keep up the status quo.
**Kentucky needs a senator who doesn’t sell us out to fossil fuel companies.** I’ve stood on the tracks with Harlan County miners and sat down with Kentuckians fighting for their livelihood. They understand that coal jobs are leaving and never coming back. They want a leader who will elevate their voices and fight for the survival of our economy and our Commonwealth with bold policies like a Green New Deal.
Mitch won’t push for the change we need as long as corporations are footing his campaign. He’s not representing the people of Kentucky. He’s representing big money.
[_**That’s why I’m leading a movement of regular folks coming together to say we’re not going to be lied to, ignored, and robbed by politicians any longer. Will you donate $10 or more toward our $100,000 goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457304/128197159/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191202_a2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=)
This is a movement for the people. And the people are ready to see an end to corruption and greed. Together, we’re going to send Mitch packing.
Let’s do this,
Charles Booker
**[Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457305/128197160/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191202_m&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=)** **[Donate Once](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457306/128197161/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191202_o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=)** Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, [_**will you donate to his exploratory committee?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12457307/128197162/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191202_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQzZTdmMC01MzE1LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTsiNce5FT8yNDAH9VgeliasnDmOkZ5qxbizLN4t81s=)

body:
Please respond by midnight: Do you approve of Mitch McConnell's disastrous Senate leadership?
---
| | | TAKE THE MCCONNELL APPROVAL POLL I need your immediate attention. Mitch McConnell returns from vacation TODAY -- I want Americans' overwhelming disapproval to be the first thing he sees. **I need 5 responses from 18326 ASAP: Do you approve of McConnell 's disastrous Senate leadership?** _[**_NO!! >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d267/3244347973/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191202_em_pet_b1_mapvbrl_all_v1")_** _**[_Yes_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d267/3244347973/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191202_em_pet_b1_mapvbrl_all_v1")**_**
---

I won't ask you for money today but I do need an immediate favor.

Mitch McConnell returns from his vacation TODAY.

After one of the most shameful months of his career -- **I want Americans' overwhelming disapproval waiting on his desk the second he walks in.**

[_**So I just launched my McConnell Approval Poll. I need to gather 5 anti-McConnell responses from 18326 ASAP showing McConnell just how ready we are to replace him. Will you take a second to take the poll? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d267/3244347973/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191202_em_pet_b1_mapvbrl_all_v1")

After blatantly covering up Trump's ties to Russia...

After threatening to slash Medicare to fund his wealthy donors' tax breaks...

After blocking every ounce of progress from our Democratic House...

I have never been more certain of anything:

**McConnell is the single worst Senate leader in modern history -- let 's make sure he knows his days are numbered.**

[_**Will you take my McConnell Approval Poll ASAP? Let 's send the overwhelming results of his failure straight to McConnell himself. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d267/3244347973/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191202_em_pet_b1_mapvbrl_all_v1")

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d264/3244347973/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d265/3244347973/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d21a/3244347973/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d21b/3244347973/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d218/3244347973/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7de/18e32a7f/506ec42c/7b22d219/3244347973/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

#
Thanks to supporters like you, we hit our November fundraising goal. In fact, we exceeded it!

Heading into 2020, this is huge for our campaign. While our opponents are raising millions from radical liberal donors, **_we’re depending on grassroots supporters like you._**

Georgia will decide who controls the White House and U.S. Senate in 2020, and your generous support is already making the difference. It will continue to make the difference in the weeks and months ahead.

As we close out 2019, we will ask for your help again to make sure we close out the year in as strong of a position as possible. However, today, we just wanted to say thank you. Bonnie and I are humbled to have you on our team.

Together, we will defend the Senate majority. Together, we will get President Trump reelected. Together, we will win in 2020!

Thank you for everything.
David Perdue

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: How do we take Texas back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Throughout the week we had seen giant beams of light moving through the night sky over El Paso and Ciudad Juárez.
Dear,
Last year 17 Texas State House Republicans won their election by less than 10 points. We can flip these seats by reaching un-registered Democrats.
There are almost 90,000 people in these 17 target districts who have voted Democrat in the past but aren’t registered to vote at their current address.
We only have to win nine of these seats for Democrats to have a majority in the Texas legislature. Victories in these districts will mean an end to racist gerrymandering, and a chance to address gun violence, reproductive rights, Medicaid expansion, criminal justice and climate change in Texas.
**[Your donation will be used to send them pre-filled voter registration forms with stamped return envelopes.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42026?t=1&akid=70699%2E444211%2EbfCR5p)**
**[Donate to Flip the Texas House](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42026?t=2&akid=70699%2E444211%2EbfCR5p)****[Flip the Texas House](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42027?t=3&akid=70699%2E444211%2EbfCR5p)** is an organization that came out of our 2018 Senate campaign, “Beto Ambassadors” who are committed to ensuring that Texas lives up to its potential at this defining moment of truth. I couldn’t be more proud of what they’re doing.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42026?t=4&akid=70699%2E444211%2EbfCR5p)
Their work will also be very positive for Congressional races, helping us to hold two newly won seats and picking up more — 6 seats were won by Republicans with margins under 5%.
And these newly registered Democrats will help us make Texas competitive for our Presidential nominee.
**In 2018, I carried nine of the 17 districts now represented by Republicans. So we know that we can do this.**
We just need your help to make sure that we make the most of this opportunity.
[**Please donate to help register known Democrats in Texas — it will help us take control of the state legislature, win more seats in Congress and help deliver Texas for the Democratic presidential nominee!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42026?t=5&akid=70699%2E444211%2EbfCR5p)

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Jeff Bezos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend: Today is another stark reminder of inequality in this country. Millions of Cyber Monday deals will create astronomical profits for CEOs like Jeff Bezos, making them even wealthier. At the same time, warehouse workers often suffer traumatic working conditions and unfair wages while barely making ends meet. I know you must be thinking, _that’s rich coming from another billionaire_. I’m not exempt from conversations about wealth disparity — and I know I have a responsibility to help reshape this system that allowed me to see such success. I take that responsibility seriously. **That’s why, in addition to signing The Giving Pledge to give away the majority of my wealth during my lifetime, I strongly support a wealth tax on the wealthiest 0.1%, and would implement a national living wage of at least $15 per hour as president.** I know that these changes won’t fix everything that’s wrong with the way money is spread in this country, but this is how we start to fix a broken system: with major structural reforms that try to even the playing field. [_**Sign on if you’re with me on this, friend — America needs a wealth tax, now.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWAZ4dH51JRK2EJGYjHYfCEyf2w80DyBr1wvUDw7mLHynr58y-2Fc4A-2FHBV0v4HdYX6lAtR1SbCIcMvCHQnMJVJkf8g1qVJrG1pJ6ePtfy1iDgIS32lOMW88vqO8RxwHHnG4kxoh7ut9BRxXvpeC-2BOcEsYFG37RR6PECrktjO3M7Qu8NiV-2Fhq-2Fa44HIuhU4YKrL0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFe8XCV0l-2F9J5EaH9q6ydlmdZx-2B0w5BmJA5mBuD2DriqUgGQU0lD-2F3VQis6jceoGvQNbCWlaDpjS4m13xQwJu50zOf-2FI7gIf2LjtE0upkBeiblJX4lbjQL7sWNmk5jn58DLVvvUgJAslHQP7YIxBUJcz-2B1lt6ZtZIvZOZ4RlFn3wpjFok-2B3pG225tF9XHzf35hojnEMUQc812T1GoL-2FfMvgsTc0uTx1XqSkyt3G6jAIfuvIgJHl6IqmAbgWEyCXemI0Tn2N38wvj1lerfPjnSF4z66Iwau-2FPWgPAiFi2h-2BgsrGkT3aYGrOAPGYTSZGUU0AZMEZq0SBI1TUk4QpdItrBtsSh-2FHQqQs-2BSIUEPZ91ww3XWsKWYtpB99RT-2F22PDRhB8-3D) On your side, Tom

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We're fighting back against gerrymandering. Are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, There's a reason that awful, unresponsive, obstructionist members of Congress get re-elected. There's a reason Republicans have a chance at winning back the House \-- gerrymandering. Take Jim Jordan's district, Ohio 4. House Republicans transferred him to the Intelligence Committee just for the impeachment hearings to shout lies and distractions at every possible opportunity. He doesn't need to worry about being proven wrong on live television day in and day out because his district looks like this: That duck of a district means Jim Jordan doesn't need to prove basic competency in order to win re-election. It's time to end partisan gerrymandering, and ensure that every vote is valued. [**Congress has the ability to outlaw partisan gerrymandering, but they have refused to do anything. Join us in calling on our lawmakers to pass legislation that ends this voter suppression before the 2020 census gives the GOP another chance to steal seats across the country and silence even more voters.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc98/6e9863e8/16c0f73a/1db0a3b0/230108314/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/gerrymandering/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for democracy, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc98/6e9863e8/16c0f73a/1db0a3b0/230108314/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/gerrymandering/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Steve Bullock
subject: Today, I'm suspending my campaign for President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BULLOCK FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Thank you. Thank you for your belief, your trust, and your support. |
---
Hello,

Thank you. Thank you for your belief, your trust, and your support.

**Today, I announced that I 'm suspending my campaign for President. While there were many obstacles we could not have anticipated when entering into this race, it has become clear that in this moment, I won't be able to break through to the top tier of this still-crowded field of candidates.**

It was about six and a half months ago, in a high school classroom in my hometown of Helena, Montana, when I entered the race.

**I entered this race as a voice to win back the places we lost, bridge divides, and rid our system of the corrupting influence of Dark Money.** While the concerns that propelled me to enter in the first place have not changed, I leave this race filled with gratitude and optimism, inspired and energized by the good people I've had the privilege of meeting over the course of the campaign.

I leaned on supporters across our country that have been by my side throughout my decade-long journey in public service, while earning the support of tens of thousands of people who knew little about me before I kicked off this campaign. So many of you contributed your time, energy, and resources. I walked out of every event and fundraiser more inspired and energized than when I entered. I am in awe of how selfless and generous you have been to me and to our effort.

I assembled an incredible team. Seasoned advisors who could have joined any of the candidates were committed to our effort. Those who moved to Helena and worked their hearts out every day. A finance team that covered the country. And the organizers and staff on the ground in Iowa, who inspired me every day through their energy, belief, and enthusiasm.

For the supporters who contributed their time, energy, and resources, and the incredible team who inspired me every day through their belief and enthusiasm, I'm thankful. To the voters who shared their personal stories, their ideas, their encouragement, and their dreams -- you make me hopeful for what our country can still achieve.

I am grateful for all of you. Your contributions and your sacrifices. I am also grateful for the contributions and sacrifices of my wife and three children.

**On the difficult days, I would joke, "it's worth the sacrifice because it's only a fair shot at the American dream and our representative democracy at stake." That truth remains. **Yet, even throughout the challenges of the campaign, I have experienced the best of what America offers.

Thank you for your support.

Best,

Steve Bullock

| Thank you for supporting our campaign. Steve is going to keep doing everything he can to help Democrats win back the places we lost, up and down the ballot.

_If you 'd like to support his efforts, please make a small donation: _
---
| | [Donate ->](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb80d5/6aee0046/45261153/2e2c96ba/3640230681/VEsH/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfp2020_fr_ty?refcode=SB_EM_TY_2019.12.01_B1_TY_X__F1_S1_C1__sdb1&amount=5&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: not looking for a billionaire savior
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I get asked on the trail often what has gone wrong with our political system. My first answer to them always goes back to Citizens United. This misguided Supreme Court decision has corrupted our political system. Millionaires and billionaires feel free to buy their way and guarantee their preferred political outcomes. **We see it in our Democratic Primary where two billionaires have each pledged to spend over $100 MILLION of their personal money to win the nomination.** Frankly, it's outrageous. [Chip in $5 right now to support the campaign with the largest percentage of grassroots donors in the race. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d3e/2073105249/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+5+right+now+to+support+the+campa&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all") I don't get the sense that people are looking for a billionaire savior. I believe they want someone who is in touch with the everyday needs of Americans out there, in every walk of life. But these billionaires feel so entitled to the nomination -- Mayor Bloomberg even said that he doesn't need to participate in the Democratic Debates because he can flood the race with money regardless -- that they don't care about what the people want. **I 'm from an immigrant family, I grew up in an underserved neighborhood, and Americans like me deserve the same chance as a billionaire hedge fund manager to succeed in this country.** [I refuse to take a cent from special interest groups or corporate PACs to get on the debate stage. It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $15 to make it instead. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d3d/2073105249/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+I+refuse+to+take+a+cent+from+special+int&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all") Thank you,
Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d3c/2073105249/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d3b/2073105249/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d3a/2073105249/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d39/2073105249/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d38/2073105249/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f5/3eb3e2fc/681b1fc6/744d2d27/2073105249/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Wow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf28/30a4f917/509270e6/28ced016/1021152117/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191202_ThankYou_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191202_ThankYou_U1_X1")

| | All I can say is wow. I knew running a campaign against one of the most well-funded and long-standing Republicans in Congress wouldn't be easy -- especially since I'm refusing corporate PAC money. But I'm blown away by the sheer volume of people buying into our campaign and believing in our vision. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - All I can say is **wow.** I knew running a campaign against one of the most well-funded and long-standing Republicans in Congress wouldn't be easy **\-- especially since I 'm refusing corporate PAC money.** But I'm blown away by the sheer volume of people buying into our campaign and believing in our vision. With your help, we blew our November goal out of the water! We couldn't have done it without your support. **We 're giving this race all we've got -- and we know you are too.** Thank you so much, Nikki | | | [Donate](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_dec?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191202_ThankYou_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Donate&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191202_ThankYou_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191202_ThankYou_U1_X1")

name: Team Weld
subject: Campaign Highlights & Happenings — December 2nd, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee
body:
|
---
| [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=1)
# Campaign Highlights & Happenings
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKu0r2brQaErcEYU9gHsflLNg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=2)
### [**_Ballot Access: We are officially on the ballot in FOUR states and have submitted paperwork for an additional SIX states!_**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fln6Ni6M6Wd8HhhSRB_KRYk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=3)
This week, we are submitting paperwork to get on the ballot in Utah, Tennessee, and North Carolina. By the end of the week, we will also have submitted paperwork to get on the ballot in Colorado, Oklahoma, and Texas! We are still waiting to hear the official word that we are on the ballot in Florida, California, and Georgia, which were submitted over the past few weeks. | | [SUPPORT BILL →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fln6Ni6M6Wd8HhhSRB_KRYk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=4)
---
## In the News: A Few of This Week's Stories
### The Washington Post: _There's at least one Republican who's not afraid to stand up to Trump_
"It is too bad that Weld is not getting more traction, because I am convinced he would be a better president not only than Trump (a very low standard) but also than any of the Democratic front-runners."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_FOtYnRF9gRXI5hpHxulyFPRES7OyYOkLIPw_o-CtwrJ9PG0h_Nwv2ppxOmguOWfGhAN9KlVPQCeId7QyYjTpfQWDLxK7AgDtyByjTDbsha1DYiN5qYWHyuB1YXgUNuea4tG5RfW07NiizSR_W8_voJqlcK_o9fvyKJ6GXnH4Fq9CeF9TUZXoUdjv2foPfiMDA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=5)
### The New Yorker: _“I’ve Never Seen Evidence So Clear:” Inside the House Effort to Draft Articles of Impeachment_
"In February, 1974, just as the House Judiciary Committee’s impeachment inquiry into Watergate was getting under way, John Doar, the inquiry’s lead counsel, asked two young staffers to prepare a report."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=WSUWAWauF5q2TKQuZqO_Mp-kUkeBDJXFSWNOZlhBGSh8KBP6LrI4bGLt0M1FtlmhzfRj7D5nh9VOTxl6sGGd2PKFKx1x8o7N1DclMwn2VMzwH3gwk5-Q5C8PEiL6e0rbRmVuGaMcdRynUGqACJ05r_u4Y--0qKN2GzSE91vteZj8Hfk9QWK0h3ScFrmOC3-Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=6)
### The Hill: _Trump challenger Bill Weld: "If I win the New Hampshire primary, all bets are off"_
"Former Massachusetts Gov. Bill Weld (R) defended his chances of unseating President Trump for the 2020 Republican nomination, saying he is betting hard on winning New Hampshire."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv3P9C9BnmyCxuUbMAixK5l959JLEDMrJMLoxCbfzy5u0qlYDzaW35U75I8Uk9vpooqf3Tj9xjRlaGW4c4KBZB2rZvbwnmFthLfoAPoT-etSl2M5SZPVKyCwCGZgRvpNd7cgB81sJvb8BMie5RjMZMQ8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=7)
### Newsweek: _Trump 2020 challenger Bill Weld accuses President of using border wall 'scare tactic' to make Americans 'angry'_
"Former Massachusetts governor Bill Weld, who's thrown his hat into the ring as a contender for the 2020 Republican party nomination, has said that President Donald Trump is using his border wall rhetoric as a 'scare tactic' to keep his voter base 'angry' at others."

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7EL176YFyxKF3ox3wD2rUfqGKDZ9d4Z4frMCFUb_Q2qbLBebXvjd4Nzb1iXFaafJ6FRLVMp0Z88WJUs1EiG0JHZfMxxNgW0syZY1vb-2NuxHwU5FMPc2l8dkRmecn-pM6TWHz1KMQJEWtI7HX1cdqjdidYXV57YnKklgXP_jmq8&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=8)
|
### Manchester Christmas Parade
Saturday, December 7th Parade Start: 1750 Elm St Manchester, NH 4:00PM ET Open to the public[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6naXpVI5VK7S1CwbssMXtf_QkVih9S9P2-y_ejy1rR22afgkRvr52M3OQWDqaNhGjQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=9)
---
| [weld2020.org](weld2020.org) | [ Gov Bill Weld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=10) | [ @govbillweld ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tqwz1e-RkyfKg8oS4PThRIU&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=11)

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=13) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191202_newsletter&n=14).

name: Booker HQ
subject: Want to be a delegate for Cory at the Democratic National Convention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey there, My name is Tamia, I'm the national political director for Cory 2020! As the leader of the political team, one of my responsibilities is to oversee the delegate selection process on behalf of the campaign. **I 'm reaching out today to see if you'd be interested in representing Cory Booker at the Democratic National Convention in Milwaukee next year.** Delegates play a very important role in our primary process. These are the people who cast their votes on the convention floor and decide the Democratic nominee. **[Fill out this form and let us know if you'd be interested in running as a delegate in Pennsylvania.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20191202_BHQ_20191202-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** After completing the form, a member of our team will be in touch. We'll provide all the guidance you need on how to successfully run as an official DNC delegate for Cory Booker. We're looking for delegates all across the country, including Pennsylvania, who share Cory's vision for repairing the damage Trump has done and making justice and opportunity real for every American. **[Let us know if you'd like to represent Pennsylvania and join Cory at the Democratic National Convention in July 2020.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20191202_BHQ_20191202-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we're in Milwaukee next summer, we'd love to have you there with us! Thanks,
Tamia Tamia Booker
National Political Director
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/become-a-delegate-for-cory?source=em_su_20191202_BHQ_20191202-su-BHQ-delegates-PA_PA_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _P.S. -- Have questions? Just reply to this email and we will be glad to answer them!_
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19f/2848073739/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19e/2848073739/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19d/2848073739/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19c/2848073739/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19b/2848073739/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0da2/5fca0d19/78a5b0fc/291ca19f/2848073739/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Jessica Cisneros
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
Our democracy and our future are on the line in 2020.
#

Peter -
Our democracy and our future are on the line in 2020. We need to come together to fight for bold ideas that can meet the challenges of this moment, but we cannot rely on winning just at the top of the ticket.
One of the most important races in the country is Texas's 28th District because it is one of our best opportunities to grow the progressive movement's power in Congress.
In this safe blue district, the incumbent, Henry Cuellar, votes and acts more like a Republican. He has an "A" rating from the NRA, takes thousands in corporate PAC money, and votes with Big Oil's agenda against aggressive climate solutions.
That's why Jessica Cisneros is challenging him as a proud progressive -- supporting Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and a $15/hour minimum wage. She'll also be a powerful ally in the fight to get big money out of our politics.
Jessica is an immigration and human rights attorney who grew up in the border town of Laredo, Texas. She saw the horrors of the Trump administration's immigration policy up close, and now she's running to help fix our broken immigration system.
She'll fight for justice for all of us.
That's why I'm incredibly proud to endorse Jessica Cisneros. Will you join me by supporting her campaign for Texas's 28th District?
**[Please make a donation-- of any amount -- to her campaign today. She's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so grassroots support is critical for her campaign.](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57ec9/29362a23/25ac6976/57bf1407/106835530/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItbnRsLWEifQ%3D%3D/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191202-ntl-a")**
There's no one better suited to this moment and district than Jessica.
Jessica's district is rated safely Democratic. Hillary Clinton won her district by 20 points in 2016, yet her opponent Henry Cuellar voted with Trump nearly 70% of the time last session. He's voted to fund Trump's racist wall, to defund Planned Parenthood and to support Big Oil's agenda. He's taken thousands from the NRA, the Koch Brothers and Big Oil in exchange for doing their bidding.
Shockingly, he claims he is a Democrat.
He's sold out his community and constituents in favor of corporate special interests and Republicans.
He has got to go, and now our movement has the chance to replace him with a true progressive. But Jessica needs us behind her:
**[Make a donation to Jessica's campaign today to help elect a real Democrat in South Texas. Every donation sends a powerful message about the strength of our movement.](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57ec9/29362a23/25ac6976/57bf1407/106835530/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItbnRsLWEifQ%3D%3D/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191202-ntl-a")**
We the people have been and always will be more powerful than any one person or party if we are united.
In solidarity,
Zephyr Teachout
**[DONATE](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57ec9/29362a23/25ac6976/57bf1407/106835530/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDItbnRsLWEifQ%3D%3D/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em191202-ntl-a")**

* * *

Friend,

I know you’re busy, so I’ll get straight to the point.

November was a huge month. The Radical Left continued to perpetuate their impeachment HOAX against President Trump and Chuck Schumer announced plans to spend _millions of dollars_ to flip critical U.S. Senate seats in 2020.

And to make matters worse... my team just informed me that we missed our November fundraising goal by $11,587.23. Friend, we cannot afford to fall short and that’s why I’m asking you one last time if - **[you would consider making an urgent contribution before midnight in order to help us crush this goal once and for all.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f272d70422cb4b478bdcf1fc05102c91&_e=4w76WWGoXdpytGhaRvDAp-_nLJ63ApXcbnVfNXKxV_DFT6e07_vRvgNnzmLGSH3eMNCKJTvTFDt3je7X-HtfOhwl9K57mLB5tdF-o8JFQFeHrJ_ynL2bY4iA4_iaTkHO2R0kGGdKCN8Fl4sTLfshneZHqAFwa4mxYk36AtuoW_ANl5S81JFWu0jtwA1Q715vPUaFhphgmLtGX9ZKBNcwH4DyG2gyiu9bY6_qIc8O166OVM-HHYquziRxBS_F_4GqL7tP22MkljtP82KiCESTX2Zi4hGTnND2OaRaT-K21XVqiYPu1Ix1mgBMVANYmG12Vgh5kggy0KkMNBjXIbL5M-Rs80gvuEwD9BKVzWtGAlYLkM-gR3uId96E74Mne4kR)**

The stakes are too high for us to show any signs of weakness.

Each day the Radical Left, with the help from their allies in the media, builds momentum to defeat President Trump and win back control of the U.S. Senate. And with recent victories in Louisiana, Kentucky, and Virginia, **Democrats truly believe the sky is the limit.**

**[The ONLY chance we have at beating Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff’s impeachment hysteria, securing President Trump’s re-election, and holding the U.S. Senate in 2020 is if we show formidable conservative strength and hit each one of our fundraising goals.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f272d70422cb4b478bdcf1fc05102c91&_e=4w76WWGoXdpytGhaRvDAp-_nLJ63ApXcbnVfNXKxV_DFT6e07_vRvgNnzmLGSH3eMNCKJTvTFDt3je7X-HtfOhwl9K57mLB5tdF-o8JFQFeHrJ_ynL2bY4iA4_iaTkHO2R0kGGdKCN8Fl4sTLfshneZHqAFwa4mxYk36AtuoW_AzadkGvpZ67Aka1GAT8-5C0bRl5mRyxBNC9AFppd5qqCgm276fyBFbiw2i8U4I0386BY_HzH0Re5z7PLt9PaezSSweNgYXrmIGlxIMhl5zk2d47qwk4EfKfKVCGOEmX0FmD-NbhUhwJ0pTnKnUd6NmfZwdZlFvIa_VapU4gZCPQEGhrxWezk4E9KZPHhYXELM3E1LR_UfbI2tGXQkqYd6B)**

We've got the next debate on the horizon, our team is preparing for the Iowa caucuses, and our final FEC fundraising deadline before voting and... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b606/45c30650/11fcf89c0/66f9c2a9/336145269/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**December is going to be our busiest month yet.** We've got the next debate on the horizon, our team is preparing for the Iowa caucuses, and our final FEC fundraising deadline before voting and caucusing starts is quickly approaching.

**But even though things are ramping up, Elizabeth is never going to lose sight of what's important in this race: you.**

**[So we want to ask you: With voting beginning in just a few weeks, what issues are on your mind right now? Fill out this quick survey to let Elizabeth know the things you care about in this race.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b606/45c30650/11fcf89c0/66f9c2ad/336145269/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNlBfU1VSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkxMjAyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMM06P_SUR_ISS_Q_20191202_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

This campaign isn't just about Elizabeth's vision. It's about the hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you. It's about the issues that you think about, and the dreams that you're fighting for.

She is going to keep putting the issues this team cares about front-and-center in this campaign -- but we can't do that without your help.

**[Click here to take the two-minute survey to share your priorities and let Elizabeth know why you're in this fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b606/45c30650/11fcf89c0/66f9c2ad/336145269/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNlBfU1VSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkxMjAyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMM06P_SUR_ISS_Q_20191202_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Y'all, Today, my Republican opponent Congressman Chip Roy _officially_ announced that he will be running for re-election in 2020. **That 's great news for the Wall Street executives, pharmaceutical lobbyists, NRA bigwigs, and giant corporations who are propping him up** \-- the Big Guys who can always count on Congressman Roy to protect their interests. **But it 's bad news for the thousands of Texans who Congressman Roy has failed time and time again** \-- the hardworking families who've been left behind as he's supported massive taxpayer giveaways to companies that ship American jobs overseas, and voted AGAINST lowering prescription drug costs, common sense gun safety measures, and tax relief for families of fallen veterans. **And unfortunately, we fell short of our crucial fundraising goal for last month, which is why I need you now more than ever.** [**Will you pitch in whatever you can to help us respond to That 's great news for the Wall Street executives, pharmaceutical lobbyists, NRA bigwigs, and giant corporations who are propping him up \-- the Big Guys who can always count on Congressman Roy to protect their interests. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" It 's time to take this seat back.
