body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | [In a minute I'm going to ask if you can make your first donation to our campaign to help us reach the donor threshold for the December Democratic debate.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c3c/1191968869/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+In+a+minute+Irsquom+going+to+ask+if+you+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all") With less than two weeks to hit the threshold, we are scrambling to qualify for the debate stage. But before that, I want to talk about why hitting the donation threshold is powerfully important. Whether or not we reach our goal in the next few days will make a real difference in the types of investments we can make going forward. As a campaign, we have already made tough strategic decisions and are focusing on making sure we have the resources to shock the world in Iowa and Nevada. [That's why the next few weeks are vital for this movement we're building together.](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c3b/1191968869/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+the+next+few+weeks+are+vi&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all") While we may be behind our goal, I'm not going to sell-out the grassroots campaign we've been running. I am proud that last quarter my campaign had the highest percentage of grassroots donors of any of the candidates running in the Democratic Primary. I will never sell-out and shift towards courting wealthy donors at exclusive events to beg for their help. I won't sell access to billionaires even if they promise gargantuan checks. I'm proud that this people-powered campaign is and has always been all about you -- not special interests, fossil fuel corporations, or the rich and powerful. [Making your ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c3a/1191968869/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Making+your+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")[first donation today will make a real difference for the future of this campaign. Will you be one of the 6,000 new donors I need to qualify for the next debate?](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c39/1191968869/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+first+donation+today+will+make+a+real+di&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c38/1191968869/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+Chip+in+amount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
---

**[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c27/1191968869/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+secondamount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
---

**[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c26/1191968869/VEsB/p/eyJlM3QwYUdseVpGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+thirdamount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
---

**[**Chip in $100 now >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c25/1191968869/VEsO/p/eyJlM3QwYUdseVpGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+fourthamount+now+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191202_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+another+amount+now+gtgt+&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
---

The next 10 days are powerfully important: if they go well we will have the resources we need to compete in Iowa and Nevada. If they go wrong, we will have an even bigger hill to climb to compete with billionaire candidates and those taking money from the corporate PACs I've refused.
**We will continue to do what we've always done:** hosting town halls, knocking on doors, going places other candidates won't, and sharing face-to-face conversations with people, inspiring them to join this fight.
**But this critical work is only possible through grassroots donations we need to raise in the next two weeks.**
[I can't thank you enough for everything you do as a part of Team Julian, and I wouldn't be asking today if it weren't critically important. Can you please chip in before midnight to power this campaign? >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c23/1191968869/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+I+cant+thank+you+enough+for+everything+y&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
Thank you for being a part of this,
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c22/1191968869/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c21/1191968869/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c20/1191968869/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c2f/1191968869/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c2e/1191968869/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8f6/3eb3e2fc/6820a069/744d2c2d/1191968869/VEsHAw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191202_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Kellyanne Conway testing new ways to undermine Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, This week, Conway called the impeachment inquiry, which has revealed stunning levels of corruption inside the Trump White House, an "ego trip" for Nancy Pelosi. It's just one in a series of attacks the administration has made against women standing up for truth getting in the way of their propaganda: Trump live-Tweeted witness intimidation to undercut former Ambassador Marie Yovanovitch's testimony \-- adding another impeachable offense to the growing list. GOP Counsel Scott Castor pressed Fiona Hill about her emotions getting in the way of her job, citing Trump mega-donor and unqualified appointee Gordon Sondland's statement that Hill was "pretty emotional" and "just upset about everything having to do with the Trump administration." With Trump and his lackeys in full-on attack mode against women, especially the House Leader, we need to hear what Democratic voters think: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9a/6e9863e8/16c2c305/1db0a3b4/3155354221/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/w64yL8qI") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9a/6e9863e8/16c2c305/1db0a3b4/3155354221/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/w64yL8qI") Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapidly changing political landscape, hearing from engaged voters is incredibly important as we plan our strategy to take back the Senate and the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9a/6e9863e8/16c2c305/1db0a3ba/3155354221/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191202c.ND&refcode2=XA4EiK32n2mX8vNAxivy")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc9a/6e9863e8/16c2c305/1db0a3b8/3155354221/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?George=20W.=20Hindman?=
subject: George Hindman Releases 2nd TV Ad
body:
Did you see my 2nd TV add? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bdf400c8aa87/george-hindman-releases-2nd-tv-ad?e=52e38a8253)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends,

Have you seen my TV ads I've recently released? Over the weekend, I released my second TV ad in my bid for the Republican nomination for CD 17 open seat.
---
| [ ](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=a5ee39357f&e=52e38a8253)
---
George Hindman 2nd TV Ad
| My first ad has been a tremendous success. My campaign's message has resonated with conservative Republicans across CD 17. The momentum for this campaign is just beginning and we won’t slow down.

I launched my first ad last week which can be viewed below.
---
| [ ](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=42dce8d897&e=52e38a8253)
---
George Hindman First TV Ad
| I can't express how thankful I am for the support my campaign has been receiving from all across the district, and I look forward to representing each of y'all in Congress, but I need your help.

As you know, our liberties and traditional American values are under attack from the radical left, and something has to be done to stop their agenda.

With your help of a small donation, Facebook post, or even requesting a yard sign, we become one step closer to winning the Republican Primary, and then winning in November.

Together, we can secure our borders, defend our traditional American Values, and put America first. Join my team today at [www.VoteHindman.com](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=b7b4d888d3&e=52e38a8253)!

For Liberty,

\- George

---

clean_body: Did you see my 2nd TV add? | | | | | | | Dear Friends, Have you seen my TV ads I've recently released? Over the weekend, I released my second TV ad in my bid for the Republican nomination for CD 17 open seat. | George Hindman 2nd TV Ad | My first ad has been a tremendous success. My campaign's message has resonated with conservative Republicans across CD 17. The momentum for this campaign is just beginning and we won’t slow down. I launched my first ad last week which can be viewed below. | George Hindman First TV Ad | I can't express how thankful I am for the support my campaign has been receiving from all across the district, and I look forward to representing each of y'all in Congress, but I need your help. As you know, our liberties and traditional American values are under attack from the radical left, and something has to be done to stop their agenda. With your help of a small donation, Facebook post, or even requesting a yard sign, we become one step closer to winning the Republican Primary, and then winning in November. Together, we can secure our borders, defend our traditional American Values, and put America first. Join my team today at ! Cory Booker isn’t spending any time focusing on his Senate re-election campaign. _He’s taking New Jersey voters for granted._ Booker believes that no matter how much he abandons the people of his state, voters will still show up to re-elect him simply because he’s a Democrat running in a blue state.**But I’ve got bad news for Booker -- the American people are waking up.** Americans all across the country are beginning to see right through the Democrats’ lies and corruption.We’re seeing the crime, poverty, debt, and lawlessness that go hand in hand with the Democrats’ policies in every major liberal city in America.And while Booker continues to ignore the people of New Jersey, this is our chance to show voters in a winnable state like New Jersey that there’s a _true_ alternative name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: It’s Christmas season at the White House!
body:
"The Spirit of America" is shining in the White House, First Lady Melania Trump announced on Twitter yesterday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb2538227d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 2, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: It’s Christmas season at the White House!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77fc2ec824&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **“The Spirit of America”** is shining in the White House, First Lady Melania Trump [announced on Twitter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf9f4fd073&e=3ee4985eea) yesterday, unveiling the 2019 White House Christmas decorations.

**The First Family** is celebrating their third Christmas in the White House. This year’s theme is a tribute to the traditions, customs, and history that make America great. Handpicked by the First Lady herself, the 2019 White House decorations celebrate the courageous individuals who have shaped our country and kept the American spirit alive:
* Upon entering the East Wing, visitors first see the cherished Gold Star Family Tree, proudly decorated by the Gold Star families of our great American military.

* In the East Room, four star-spangled trees stand tall, glimmering with stars and cascading ribbons. Features of the American flag are proudly incorporated.

* The State Dining room celebrates “America, the beautiful,” honoring landmarks from across our country—including the Golden Gate Bridge, Space Needle, Mount Rushmore, the Alamo, Gateway Arch, Liberty Bell, and Statue of Liberty.

* Ending in the Grand Foyer and Cross Hall, guests find themselves in a glistening winter garden filled with 22 evergreens, 14 golden magnolia topiaries, 10 floral urns, and dusted with fresh-fallen snow.

“**I am delighted to share** this beautiful exhibit of patriotism for all to see, and excited for everyone to experience the beauty of the #Christmas season!” the First Lady tweeted.

[First Lady Melania Trump Unveils Christmas at the White House 2019](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4649e5920e&e=3ee4985eea)

**IN PHOTOS** : [“The Spirit of America!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c99d421217&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump surprises troops in Afghanistan!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18ee96bcba&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Donald J. Trump** left Washington to spend the Thanksgiving holiday with his family last Tuesday. Little did most Americans know that the Commander-in-Chief had another plan in mind—one that required a high level of secrecy to pull off safely.

**Just ahead of the holiday** , the President flew overnight for a surprise visit to see American soldiers who were unable to spend Thanksgiving with their families.

**On Thursday,** President Trump surprised the world when he arrived at Bagram Airfield in Afghanistan. With Thanksgiving meals in hand, he let our troops know just how grateful the American people are for their service.

**“There’s nowhere** I’d rather celebrate this Thanksgiving than right here with the toughest, strongest, best, and bravest warriors on the face of the Earth,” he said.

**During the holiday season,** we are especially reminded of the sacrifices that the men and women in our armed forces make. “We flew 8,331 miles to be here tonight for one simple reason: to tell you, in person, that this Thanksgiving is a special Thanksgiving,” the President said.

**“You are very special people.** And you don’t even know how much the people of our country love and respect you . . . It’s why I’m here. I’m just bringing the message.”

[In photos: President Trump spends Thanksgiving with our troops overseas.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e5f799d27&e=3ee4985eea)

**Behind the scenes:** [Inside President Trump's secret trip to Afghanistan](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89b7ce2693&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **First Lady Melania Trump reviews the Christmas decorations in the Cross Hall of the White House** | December 1, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68b53c27df&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99743649f5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=780c572e63)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: If you agree that Amazon and other companies sucking up billions of dollars in commerce need to pay their fair share, please add your name and let’s send a message that we’re ready for a new set of rules in our economy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU) Yang Gang --

Over the past several years, Cyber Monday has become a landmark holiday for Americans looking for deals on electronics, clothing, and other consumer products.

Experts are predicting that Americans will spend nearly $10 billion online today -- a huge increase over last year -- with most of that money going straight to companies like Amazon and other online retailers.

These trends are why 30% of America’s malls and stores will close over the next five years. With retail being one of the most common jobs in the country, what are the millions of retail workers going to do when their jobs are displaced by robots in fulfillment centers?

These are the questions we need to be asking. Our leaders need to be grappling with these issues and I’m running for president because I can see that they are not. They don’t want to think about problems that they don’t have solutions for.

Here’s the bottom line: We’re not going to block technological progress, but we can make sure that all gain from it. I’ve put forward a series of proposals that would allow Americans to share in the bounty of the 21st century economy.

**[If you agree that Amazon and other companies sucking up billions of dollars in commerce need to pay their fair share, please add your name and let’s send a message that we’re ready for a new set of rules in our economy.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191202-amazonpetition?source=email-20191202pm-all&t=6&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU)** | [Add your name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191202-amazonpetition?source=email-20191202pm-all&t=7&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU)
---
Imagine a future in which all Americans benefit from the gains of days like Cyber Monday. Imagine a society where retirement-age men and women aren’t forced to work grueling hours to make ends meet -- sometimes even during the holidays.

This future is possible. We just need to push ourselves to think harder and make it a reality. I’m running for president because I know we can do so much better by our people.

Thank you for putting Humanity First,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18712?t=2&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4052%2E377263%2E642UqU) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390976/55b66746/2d424dce/80f1717/895495330/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")

| | Thank you. We sent an ambitious goal of 1,500 grassroots donations for November. I was inspired and humbled by the outcome--we surpassed our goal by over 1,000 donors because of this grassroots movement we've built together. **Our coalition is strong -- made up of teachers, farmers, caterers, drummers, social workers, photographers, medical aides, stay-at-home parents, gardeners, and a lot of folks who are still looking for a job in Trump's America.** You are an essential part of getting the word out that we are building a new kind of politics - one that brings people in. There's no doubt that we have momentum, and we're still growing; more people are joining us every day. **We're on to something here.
